texto: I'm not about to talk about what's romantic in my life - I figure if you talk about it once, then that's an open invitation for everyone to dig into your personal life even further. So, I just keep my private life to myself.
explicacao: Citação de James Van Der Beek sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I'm not about to talk about what's romantic in my life - I figure if you talk about it once, then…” articula vida, myself, my-life em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como myself e my-life.
